Source:  https://github.com/kmackay/micro-ecc
Commit:  541b3a78026420a3e369c4c9281c396b5e531113
Date:    2024-11-13
License: BSD 2-Clause (see LICENSE.txt)

Vendored files:
  uECC.c
  uECC.h
  uECC_vli.h
  types.h
  platform-specific.inc
  curve-specific.inc
  LICENSE.txt

Files NOT vendored (and why):
  asm_arm.inc, asm_arm_mult_square.inc,
  asm_arm_mult_square_umaal.inc           - We force the portable C path
  asm_avr.inc, asm_avr_mult_square.inc      via -DuECC_PLATFORM=uECC_arch_other
                                            in lib/crypto/Makefile, so these
                                            inline-asm files are never #include'd.
  test/, examples/, scripts/              - Upstream test/example code, unused.
  emk_project.py, emk_rules.py            - Upstream build helpers, unused.
  library.properties                      - Arduino library descriptor, unused.

Compile-time configuration (set via lib/crypto/Makefile):
  uECC_PLATFORM            = uECC_arch_other (0)  -- portable C, no inline asm
  uECC_SUPPORTS_secp160r1  = 0
  uECC_SUPPORTS_secp192r1  = 0
  uECC_SUPPORTS_secp224r1  = 0
  uECC_SUPPORTS_secp256r1  = 1                    -- the only curve we use
  uECC_SUPPORTS_secp256k1  = 0
  uECC_SUPPORT_COMPRESSED_POINT = 0
  uECC_SQUARE_FUNC         = 0                    -- code-size win

This phase only exercises uECC_verify(); signing and key-generation are
not used. The default RNG hooks in platform-specific.inc are inert on
arm-none-eabi (no Windows/POSIX/RIOT/NRF52 macros defined).

No source modifications were made to the vendored .c/.h/.inc files.
